info.title: Azents Public API
info.description: Public read-only API server for Azents

post.description:
Create an Agent.

Any workspace member can create one.
The creator is automatically registered as the first administrator.

get.description:
List Agents in a workspace.

Any workspace member can list Agents.
Public Agents are visible to everyone; private Agents are visible only to
administrators and owners.

Get Agent details.

Any workspace member can view them.
Private Agents are visible only to administrators and owners.

patch.description:
Update an Agent.

Only administrators or workspace owners can update it.

delete.description:
Delete an Agent.

Only administrators or workspace owners can delete it.

get.description:
List memories for one Agent and scope.

Agent-scope Memory is readable by users who can view the Agent. User-scope
Memory lists only the current user's entries.

post.description: Create Memory with strict conflict semantics.

get.description: Get one visible Memory by ID.

delete.description: Delete one Memory by ID.

post.description:
Issue a presigned PUT ticket for avatar upload.

Only administrators or workspace owners can do this. The ticket TTL is the
server constant of 10 minutes. The client uploads the file directly with a
PUT request to the issued `upload_url`, then calls the `finalize` endpoint.

Validate and resize the uploaded file, then apply it to the Agent.

The server downloads the actual bytes from S3 and reruns handler validation,
so it does not trust the client-reported size/type. On success, returns an
`AgentResponse` containing the new thumbnail URL.

delete.description:
Remove an Agent avatar.

Only administrators or workspace owners can do this. Existing thumbnails in
S3 are deleted best-effort, and garbage-collected by Lifecycle on failure.

get.description:
List Agent administrators.

Any workspace member can view them.

post.description:
Add an administrator to an Agent.

Only existing administrators or workspace owners can add one.

delete.description:
Remove an administrator from an Agent.

Only existing administrators or workspace owners can remove one.
The last administrator cannot be removed.

get.description: Get Agent Runtime status.

post.description: Store Agent Runtime start desired state.
Store Agent Runtime stop desired state.
Store Agent Runtime restart command.
Store Agent Runtime reset command.
Return the Agent Runtime observe read model.
Send an email verification code.
Verify an authentication code and issue a JWT.

get.description: Return whether signup UX can be shown.

post.description: Send a signup link by email.
Check signup token status.
Create an account from a signup token and issue a JWT.
Check password reset token status.
Set a password from a password reset token.
Issue new tokens from a refresh token.
Revoke the current session.
Log in with email and password.

get.description: Get available login methods for an email.

post.description: Start ChatGPT OAuth device flow.

get.description: Poll ChatGPT OAuth device flow status once.

delete.description: Cancel ChatGPT OAuth device flow.

post.description:
Issue a short-lived HMAC ticket for WebSocket connections.

After JWT authentication, returns a signed ticket valid for 30 seconds.
The client connects to WebSocket with this ticket, without exposing the raw JWT.

get.description: List the current user's conversation sessions in a workspace.

patch.description: Update or delete the goal of an existing session.
Pause or resume the goal state of an existing session under user control.

post.description: Request active run stop for an existing session at the REST control boundary.
Accept a composer input at the REST boundary.
Create a team AgentSession and accept its first message.
Accept a manual failed-run retry at the REST boundary.
Accept an existing user message edit at the REST boundary.

get.description: Return URL-selected AgentSession context inspector information.
Get an Agent's team primary AgentSession, creating one if absent.
List active team sessions for an Agent with team primary first.

post.description: Create a non-primary team AgentSession for an Agent.

get.description: List Agent Project path presets.
Get default Project paths for a new AgentSession.
Preview Git refs for a source Project path.

post.description: Archive a non-primary inactive AgentSession.
Request retry for a failed operation TurnAction execution.
Finalize a failed operation TurnAction execution as discarded.
Request manual cleanup retry for an Azents-owned session Git worktree.

get.description: Get a URL-selected AgentSession by agent/session pair.
Get the durable Subagent Tree projection for a session tree.

patch.description: Update or clear a user-facing AgentSession title.

get.description: Return composer actions available for a session.
Get the backend-owned Project browser manifest for an AgentSession.

post.description: Preview a Project browser manifest before AgentSession creation.

get.description: List Agent Workspace Projects for an AgentSession.

post.description: Register an existing directory in Agent Workspace as a Project.

delete.description: Delete a Project registry row for an AgentSession.

get.description: Page through persisted event history for a session.

parameters.name: before

schema.description: Query only events before this ID, as a backward cursor
schema.title: Before

parameters.description: Query only events before this ID, as a backward cursor

parameters.name: after

schema.description: Query only events after this ID, as a forward cursor
schema.title: After

parameters.description: Query only events after this ID, as a forward cursor

get.description: Get the current live event projection for a session.
Get Agent Workspace bootstrap status.

delete.description: Idempotently delete the pending input buffer.

get.description: Get an Agent Workspace directory or file preview.

schema.title: Response Chat V1 Read Agent Workspace Path

delete.description: Delete an Agent Workspace file or directory.

get.description: Get Agent Workspace file or directory metadata.

post.description: Create an Agent Workspace directory.
Move or rename an Agent Workspace file or directory.

delete.description: Delete multiple Agent Workspace files or directories.

post.description: Move multiple Agent Workspace files or directories.

get.description: Download an Agent Workspace file.

parameters.name: path

schema.description: Agent Workspace file path to download
schema.title: Path

parameters.description: Agent Workspace file path to download

delete.description: Delete a session and related files. Only the owner can delete it.

post.description: Upload only Exchange attachments scoped to the Agent.

get.description: Download an Exchange file.

delete.description: Delete an Exchange file.

get.description:
Return the server readiness status.

This is the endpoint for the Kubernetes readiness probe.

Return the server liveness status.

This is the endpoint for the Kubernetes liveness probe.

post.description:
Invite a user to a workspace.

Requires manager-or-higher permission. Handles new invitations, re-inviting
rejected invitations, and resending emails for pending invitations.

get.description:
List invitations for a workspace.

Requires manager-or-higher permission.

Get my invitation for the workspace.

Non-members can also call this.

schema.title: Response Invitation V1 Get My Invitation

get.description: List pending invitations received by the current user.

post.description: Accept an invitation.
Reject an invitation.

delete.description:
Cancel an invitation.

Requires manager-or-higher permission.

post.description:
Request to join a workspace.

Any logged-in user can request this, including non-members.

get.description:
List join requests for a workspace.

Requires manager-or-higher permission.
Get my join request status.

schema.title: Response Join Request V1 Get My Join Request

post.description:
Approve a join request.

Requires manager-or-higher permission.

Reject a join request.

Requires manager-or-higher permission.

Mute a join request.

Requires manager-or-higher permission. Notifications are not sent on re-request.

delete.description:
Delete a join request.

Requires manager-or-higher permission. Also used to unmute.

post.description:
Create an LLM Provider Integration.

Requires LLM integration write permission.

get.description:
List LLM Provider Integrations in a workspace.

Requires LLM integration read permission.

Get LLM Provider Integration details.

Requires LLM integration read permission.

patch.description:
Update an LLM Provider Integration.

Requires LLM integration write permission.

delete.description:
Delete an LLM Provider Integration.

Requires LLM integration write permission.

get.description:
List stored model catalog entries for an integration.

Requires LLM integration read permission.
This endpoint reads only stored projections and never calls providers.

post.description:
Synchronize stored model catalog entries for an integration.

Requires LLM integration write permission.

get.description: List available authentication methods.
List authentication methods available for elevation without elevation.

post.description: Send an email OTP for step-up authentication.
Perform step-up authentication with email OTP.
Perform step-up authentication with password.
Set or change password.

delete.description: Delete password.

get.description: Get the workspace default model settings.

put.description: Update the workspace default model settings.

post.description:
Create a Toolkit Config.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

get.description:
List Toolkit Configs in a workspace.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

List Toolkit Configs available to the current user.

Requires Toolkit read permission.

Get Toolkit Config details.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

patch.description:
Update a Toolkit Config.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

delete.description:
Delete a Toolkit Config.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

post.description:
Create a Toolkit Scope.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

get.description:
List Scopes for a Toolkit.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

delete.description:
Delete a Toolkit Scope.

Requires Toolkit write permission.

get.description:
List Toolkits attached to an Agent.

Requires Toolkit read permission.

post.description:
Attach a Toolkit to an Agent.

Requires Toolkit read permission.

delete.description:
Detach a Toolkit from an Agent.

Requires Toolkit read permission.

get.description:
Return the list of Toolkits provided by the platform.

Returns metadata for every tool registered in toolkit_registry.
Accessible without authentication.

Return the GitHub Platform App installation URL.

Creates a JWT with Platform App credentials configured on the server,
calls the GitHub API to fetch the App slug, then builds the installation URL.
Requires Toolkit write permission.

Return the GitHub Platform App OAuth authorization URL.

Starts an OAuth flow so the user can log in to GitHub and list their own
installations. Requires Toolkit write permission.

post.description:
Return installations accessible with the user GitHub OAuth token.

Exchanges GitHub App OAuth code for an access token, calls
``GET /user/installations``, and returns only installations the user can access.
Requires Toolkit write permission.

Create a manager-owned toolkit OAuth authorization URL.

Requires Toolkit write permission.
Exchange authorization code for a toolkit-level OAuth connection.

delete.description: Delete a toolkit-level OAuth connection.

post.description:
Test the connection of a stored Toolkit.

Requires Toolkit read permission.

Test the connection for Toolkit settings.

When ``toolkit_config_id`` exists, load credentials stored in DB and override
them with credentials from the body, prioritizing form values in edit mode.

Requires Toolkit read permission.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's information.

Get whether first owner bootstrap is available.

This endpoint is intentionally public because it is available only before
the first user exists and is gated by server-side bootstrap invariants.

post.description:
Create the first Owner and Workspace.

This endpoint is intentionally public because normal authentication cannot
exist before the first user. The service allows it only when user count is
zero and first-owner bootstrap is enabled.

get.description: Get a Workspace by handle.
List Workspaces the current user belongs to.

post.description: Create a Workspace and register the current user as Owner.

get.description: Return the current user's workspace member information.
Return the current user's workspace profile.

patch.description:
Update the current user's workspace profile.

Name, locale, and similar fields can be changed.

get.description:
List workspace members.

Requires member read permission.

patch.description:
Change a workspace member role.

Requires member management permission.

delete.description:
Delete a workspace member.

Requires member management permission.

UploadedImage.title: UploadedImage
UploadedImage.description:
Common response schema for uploaded image + thumbnails.

agent avatar, workspace icon, chat attachment preview, etc. all reuse this type.
`default` is always non-null, so UI can safely render image with
`default.url` even when all `thumbnails` are None.

tags.name: Agent v1
tags.description:
Agent API (Public)

Workspace-scoped Agent CRUD and administrator management endpoints.

tags.name: Agent Runtime v1
tags.description:
Agent Runtime API (Public)

Agent-scoped Runtime lifecycle state and server-computed summaries.

tags.name: Auth v1
tags.description:
Auth API (Public)

Authentication endpoints based on email verification codes.

tags.name: ChatGPT OAuth v1
tags.description:
ChatGPT OAuth API (Public)

Starts and completes ChatGPT OAuth device-code connections.
Tokens and authorization codes are never returned in API responses.

tags.name: Chat v1
tags.description:
Chat API (Public)

WebSocket chat and REST message lookup endpoints.

tags.name: Invitation v1
tags.description:
Workspace Invitation API (Public)

Workspace invitation create, received-list, accept, and reject endpoints.

tags.name: Join Request v1
tags.description:
Workspace Join Request API (Public)

Workspace join request create, list, approve, reject, mute,
and delete endpoints.

tags.name: LLM Provider Integration v1
tags.description:
LLM Provider Integration API (Public)

Workspace-scoped LLM provider integration CRUD endpoints.
Credentials are not included in responses.

tags.name: Security v1
tags.description:
Security API (Public)

Security settings and step-up authentication endpoints.

tags.name: Toolkit v1
tags.description:
Toolkit API (Public)

Manager: Toolkit CRUD and scope management.
Member: available Toolkit lookup and Agent Toolkit attach/detach.

tags.name: User v1
tags.description:
User API (Public)

Endpoint for retrieving the current user information.

tags.name: WorkspaceUser v1
tags.description:
WorkspaceUser API (Public)

Workspace member lookup, role change, and delete endpoints.
